title: Party | Banquet of the Gods
overview: Bell's back with a new adventure! When the powerful leader of the Apollo Familia takes notice of him, his life with his Goddess is under threat.

title: Apollo | Sun God
overview: Apollo Familia has laid down their challenge, but Hestia refuses. Apollo tries to force her hand...

title: Conversion | Gathering
overview: Bell goes to train for the War Game, and it's up to the rest of the party to rescue Lili. Hestia puts her plan into action, but Lili refuses to leave the Soma Familia.

title: War Game | War Game
overview: It's time for the War Games, and the Hestia Family, and its new members, are ready. Can they defeat the entire Apollo Familia and save Bell from Apollo's clutches?

title: Home | The Hearthfire Mansion
overview: The Hestia Familia was victorious in their battle against Apollo, and now they've won a huge mansion and a giant pile of cash! Hestia sets out to recruit for the Familia, but there's something she's forgetting...

title: Ishtar Familia | City of Lust
overview: Bell is caught up in a new adventure that takes him to the seedy underbelly of Orario: the pleasure quarters.

title: Renard | Fox Person
overview: With the help of Haruhime the Renard, Bell escapes from the Amazoness prostitutes. But he begins to wonder about Haruhime, who says she was forced to be a prostitute against her will and isn't worth being saved.

title: Ephemeral Dreams | Killing Stone
overview: Bell decides he's going to get money in the dungeon to purchase Haruhime. But he runs into a trap when the Ishtar Familia decides to kidnap him.

title: Barbera | War Prostitutes
overview: With the true purpose of the ritual and the killing stone revealed, Bell decides that he's going to take any risk to save Haruhime.

title: Argonaut | Longing to Be a Hero
overview: The Ishtar Familia's plan has been found out by Freya, who launches a raid on their home. Just when things are bad enough for Bell, their interference brings even more chaos!

title: Rakia | Army's Advance
overview: With Haruhime safe at the Familia, things begin to calm down. But when Hestia makes a casual pass at Bell and he shuts her down hard, she runs out of the mansion and into the waiting arms of kidnappers!

title: Song of Love | Goddess and Child
overview: Bell and Hestia spend a relaxing few days at a village in the wilderness, and participate in a local festival. Bell ponders what to do about his relationship with his immortal Goddess, and if he really is ready to love her.
